pairs.name: Risk vs Opportunity
pairs.description: General-purpose. One agent stress-tests, the other advocates.

agent_a.label: risk/cost/failure
agent_a.research: Focus on RISKS, COSTS, FAILURE MODES, edge cases, and what could go wrong. Be the skeptic.
agent_a.turn: RISKS, COSTS, FAILURE MODES. Be the skeptic.

agent_b.label: value/opportunity/success
agent_b.research: Focus on BENEFITS, OPPORTUNITIES, SUCCESS CASES, and what could go right. Be the advocate.
agent_b.turn: BENEFITS, OPPORTUNITIES, SUCCESS CASES. Be the advocate.

pairs.name: Simplicity vs Correctness
pairs.description: Architecture and design. One agent favors the simple path, the other demands rigor.

agent_a.label: simplicity/pragmatism
agent_a.research: Focus on SIMPLICITY, PRAGMATISM, and minimal viable solutions. Argue for the approach that is easiest to build, understand, and maintain. Challenge unnecessary complexity.
agent_a.turn: SIMPLICITY, PRAGMATISM. Favor the simpler path.

agent_b.label: correctness/rigor
agent_b.research: Focus on CORRECTNESS, RIGOR, and handling all edge cases properly. Argue for the approach that is most technically sound, even if more complex. Challenge shortcuts that sacrifice reliability.
agent_b.turn: CORRECTNESS, RIGOR. Demand the thorough approach.

pairs.name: Speed vs Maintainability
pairs.description: Roadmap and refactoring. One agent pushes to ship now, the other builds for the long term.

agent_a.label: speed/ship-now
agent_a.research: Focus on SPEED TO SHIP, time-to-value, and pragmatic shortcuts. Argue for getting something working and in users' hands fast. Challenge gold-plating and premature abstraction.

agent_b.label: maintainability/long-term
agent_b.research: Focus on MAINTAINABILITY, long-term cost, and sustainable architecture. Argue for investments that pay off over time. Challenge shortcuts that create tech debt.

pairs.name: Brand Strategy vs Creative Direction
pairs.description: Branding and identity. One agent evaluates positioning and market fit, the other pushes for emotional resonance and boldness.

agent_a.label: brand-strategist
agent_a.research: Focus on POSITIONING, DIFFERENTIATION, MARKET CLARITY, audience perception, and whether the brand works in context. Evaluate against competitors. Be the strategist.
agent_a.turn: POSITIONING, DIFFERENTIATION, MARKET FIT. Does it work in context?

agent_b.label: creative-director
agent_b.research: Focus on EMOTIONAL RESONANCE, VISUAL IMAGINATION, STORYTELLING POWER, boldness, and what makes the brand memorable and felt. Be the creative director.
agent_b.turn: EMOTIONAL RESONANCE, MEMORABILITY, BOLDNESS. Does it move people?
